Constraints are the catalyst of invention. An infinite search space leads to paralysis. The most creative inventions happen when you are forced to solve a problem within appropriately narrow constraints.

Kevin had been leading Science at OpenAI. I had the privilege and pleasure of knowing and interacting with him as a friend. I am also honored to have been a co-author of the first OpenAI science vision paper that he organized. Thank you, Kevin. 🙏 https://t.co/oGFCrdHLNu
